reason: Global TianChen-RV compiler stack, capability, plugin, and descriptor-boundary invariants for this source-frontdoor change.
Keeps tcrv.exec limited to execution, ABI, target, capability, dispatch, and fallback envelopes while source arithmetic remains outside core compute semantics.
Ensures shared orchestration stays target-neutral and RVV family behavior remains plugin/target-owned.
Defines the bounded RVV finite binary family, selected vector-shape metadata, frontend family markers, and typed i32-vsub body authority.
Requires extension-family ops to flow through the common EmitC route and forbids descriptor strings as computation authority.
Defines runtime ABI ownership, dynamic vector source-tail authority, target artifact export preflight, and selected-plan metadata coherence.
Defines required lit/build/export/ssh-rvv evidence boundaries for dynamic vector source and RVV finite binary artifacts.
